rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for this clear header.
Selected `gemini-flash` for the description, as visual verification confirms 'Recepta Varia.' is more accurate than 'Receipts Varia.'.

rows.description: By. Mr. Dayman, the third Instalment, for repayment of Loan on Acct of the Borrower the poor Allotment at St. Tew, due Mich. 1835
rows.notes: Amounts (6 0 0) agreed by both extractors. The description was chosen from `gemini-flash` as it is a more accurate transcription of several terms (e.g., 'By. Mr.' vs 'Pd. W.', 'St. Tew' vs 'New') based on visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Payment from Mr Dayman being the third instalment repaying a loan on account of the poor allotment at St. Tew, due Michaelmas 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Mr Dayman being the third instalment repaying a loan on account of the poor allotment at St. Tew, due Michaelmas 1835, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.description: One yrs. Int. on £197-19-5. 3/4 p.ct. Shortbli's deposit of 150£ for the P. Whittenham Estate
rows.notes: Amounts (5 18 8) agreed by both extractors. The description was chosen from `gemini-flash` as it is significantly more accurate in several numerical and textual details (e.g., '£197' vs '1797', 'Shortbli's' vs 'Sheriff's') after visual verification.
rows.english_description: One year's interest on £197 19s 5d at three quarters per cent; Shortbli's deposit of £150 for the Whittenham estate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's interest on £197 19s 5d at three quarters per cent; Shortbli's deposit of £150 for the Whittenham estate, amounting to £5 18s 8d.

rows.description: of the Bursar, Mr. Falconer, Increm. Domus including Bedmaking Fund 1/2 yr. to Xmas 1835
rows.notes: Amounts (578 14 1) agreed by both extractors. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly split this single logical entry across two physical lines, leading to an extra row (its row 5) which was dropped. The description was selected from `gemini-flash` for its greater accuracy ('Mr. Falconer', 'Increm. Domus', 'Bedmaking Fund 1/2 yr. to Xmas 1835') based on visual verification.
rows.english_description: Increase to the college house (Increm. Domus) including the bedmaking fund, received from the Bursar Mr Falconer for the half year to Christmas 1835.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Increase to the college house (Increm. Domus) including the bedmaking fund, received from the Bursar Mr Falconer for the half year to Christmas 1835, amounting to £578 14s 1d.

rows.description: Of Do. Bible Clerks Fees for the open scholar.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Bible clerks' fees for the open scholar (received via the Bursar), amounting to £15 8s 3d.

rows.notes: Selected `gpt-5-mini`. Visual verification clearly confirms the pounds amount is '1816', not '1016' as read by `gemini-flash`. Also, `gpt-5-mini` correctly identified that there is no descriptive text on the total line, only the numerical total with a double underline.
